buildCommand: cd apps/admin_web && npm install && npm run build && rm -rf ../../dist_public && mkdir -p ../../dist_public && cp -r dist/* ../../dist_public/ && cp ../../landing/privacy-policy.html ../../dist_public/ && cp ../../landing/terms-of-service.html ../../dist_public/ && cp ../../landing/data-deletion.html ../../dist_public/
